label: Closing Behavior
description: How the reply should close the loop at the end.

options.label: Confirm Back
options.instruction: Ask the customer to confirm the one detail needed for the next step.

options.label: Open Door
options.instruction: Close by inviting one follow-up question if the issue is still unclear.

options.label: Staff Handoff
options.instruction: Close by naming the staff owner who will take the next action.
